settings.title: Account Settings
settings.description: Manage your personal account settings and preferences.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Your personal information and profile details

linkedAccounts.title: Linked Accounts
linkedAccounts.description: Connect your account with external providers for easier sign-in

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: Delete your account and all your data
deleteAccount.confirmDescription: Type {word} to confirm. This action cannot be undone.

editProfile.title: Edit Profile
editProfile.description: Update your name and phone number.
editProfile.name: Name

changePassword.descriptionChange: Enter your current password and choose a new one.
changePassword.descriptionCreate: Create a password for your account.

locale.title: Language
locale.description: Choose the default language for the app and transactional emails.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Choose how the app looks to you. Pick a single theme, or sync with your system and switch automatically.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Protect your account with an authenticator app and backup codes.
twoFactor.active: Two-factor authentication is active for this account.
twoFactor.scanQrInstruction: Scan the QR code, then verify with a code from your authenticator app.

billing.title: Manage your team plan
billing.description: Choose a plan that fits your team's needs. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time.
billing.creditPacksDescription: Buy one-time top-ups when your team needs more AI usage.
billing.oneTimeProductsDescription: Sell one-time workspace upgrades without moving the team to a recurring plan.
billing.creditActivityDescription: Recent grants, charges, and refunds for this workspace.

organization.title: Organization Settings
organization.description: Manage your organization details and subscription.

members.title: Members
members.description: Manage your organization members and invitations.
members.pendingCount: {count, plural, one {# invitation} other {# invitations}} pending

security.title: Security
security.description: Review the security controls that protect your account.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Review product activity, security changes, and billing events for your workspace.
notifications.unreadCount: {count, plural, one {# unread notification} other {# unread notifications}}.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Customize your display and language preferences.

oauthErrors.accountAlreadyLinked: This provider is already linked to another account.
oauthErrors.emailMismatch: Use a provider account with the same email address as this account.
oauthErrors.notLinked: Unable to link this provider. Try a different sign-in method.
oauthErrors.signinFailed: Unable to start provider linking. Please try again.
oauthErrors.linkFailed: Unable to link this provider. Please try again.
